rule: canonicalizing an element subtree by Id under inclusive C14N renders all in-scope namespaces inherited from ancestors at the apex (both xmlns:a and xmlns:b)
provenance: derived from W3C Canonical XML 1.0 REC (xml-c14n-20010315) §2.4 and §3.7 (document-subset) rule that a subset's apex renders inherited in-scope namespace nodes; expected output computed by hand from the spec rule, not from a third-party tool.
